description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and a well designed look, this tunic can be worn with contrasting leggings and sandals for an evening out in style. Product Details Black coloured sleeveless tunic, has a square neckline with a curved centre in front and a V neckline at the back bordered with sequins, has a string detail hanging from the curved part of the neckline which can convert the top into a halter neck as well, ruffled detail below the sequins at the back, has ruffles around the arm holes, draping below the yoke and tapers at the waist Material and Care Viscose Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
